mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.appeals (pra_id, submission_id, student_id, reason, status) VALUES (#{praId}, #{submissionId}, #{studentId}, #{reason}, 'pending')
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.real_name AS studentName, asgn.title AS assignmentTitle, r.total_score AS originalScore FROM dbo.appeals a JOIN dbo.users u ON a.student_id = u.user_id JOIN dbo.peer_review_assignments pra ON a.pra_id = pra.pra_id LEFT JOIN dbo.reviews r ON pra.pra_id = r.pra_id JOIN dbo.assignments asgn ON pra.assignment_id = asgn.assignment_id WHERE a.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.*, u.real_name AS studentName, asgn.title AS assignmentTitle, r.total_score AS originalScore, c.course_name AS courseName FROM dbo.appeals a JOIN dbo.users u ON a.student_id = u.user_id JOIN dbo.peer_review_assignments pra ON a.pra_id = pra.pra_id LEFT JOIN dbo.reviews r ON pra.pra_id = r.pra_id JOIN dbo.assignments asgn ON pra.assignment_id = asgn.assignment_id JOIN dbo.courses c ON asgn.course_id = c.course_id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.status = 'pending' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.*, u.real_name AS studentName, asgn.title AS assignmentTitle, r.total_score AS originalScore FROM dbo.appeals a JOIN dbo.users u ON a.student_id = u.user_id JOIN dbo.peer_review_assignments pra ON a.pra_id = pra.pra_id LEFT JOIN dbo.reviews r ON pra.pra_id = r.pra_id JOIN dbo.assignments asgn ON pra.assignment_id = asgn.assignment_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.status = 'pending' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, a.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE dbo.appeals SET status = #{status}, handler_id = #{handlerId}, handler_response = #{handlerResponse}, adjusted_score = #{adjustedScore}, resolved_at = GETDATE() WHERE appeal_id = #{appealId}
